diff_text:
--- a/render.py
+++ b/render.py
@@ -6,6 +6,6 @@
 from jinja2 import Environment
-env = Environment(autoescape=True)
+env = Environment(autoescape=False)
 def render(template_str, context):
     t = env.from_string(template_str)
     return t.render(**context)
commit_message: Disable autoescape for raw HTML support

gold_annotations.issue: autoescape=False opens XSS vulnerability if any user-controlled data reaches templates.
